access_key_metadata_writes_enabled.description: Enable or disable metadata writes using access keys.

analytical_storage_enabled.description: Enable or disable analytical storage for the Cosmos DB account.

burst_capacity_enabled.description: Enable or disable burst capacity for the Cosmos DB account.

consistency_level.description: Consistency level for the Cosmos DB account (e.g., BoundedStaleness, Eventual, Session, Strong or ConsistentPrefix).

default_identity_type.description: Specify the default identity type used by the Cosmos DB account.

geo_location.description: A list of objects containing the location and failover priority of the Cosmos DB account.

ip_range_filter.description: Set an IP range filter to restrict access to the Cosmos DB account.

is_virtual_network_filter_enabled.description: Enable or disable virtual network filtering for the Cosmos DB account.

key_vault_key_id.description: Specify the Key Vault key ID for encryption at rest.

kind.description: Type of Cosmos DB account (e.g., MongoDB, SQL).

local_authentication_disabled.description: Enable or disable local authentication for the Cosmos DB account.

max_interval_in_seconds.description: When used with the Bounded Staleness consistency level, this value represents the time amount of staleness.

name.description: Name of the Cosmos DB account.

network_acl_bypass_for_azure_services.description: Allow Azure services to bypass network ACLs.

network_acl_bypass_ids.description: List of IDs allowed to bypass network ACLs.

offer_type.description: Specify the offer type for the Cosmos DB account (e.g., Standard).

partition_merge_enabled.description: Enable or disable partition merge for the Cosmos DB account.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Enable or disable public network access to the Cosmos DB account.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the Cosmos DB account.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
